ul.li: Ordering: Bitmap utilizes Little-Endian word-major, bit-minor storage.
Atomic Safety: Bit updates must use LOCK BTS or architectural spinlocks.
Memory Alignment: 8-byte aligned word access required for AVX/SSE optimizations.
Termination: word != ~0ULL (Find first word with at least one zero bit)
Operation: NOT RAX then CTZ (Count Trailing Zeros)

g.text: Byte Offset | Data Value (64-bit Word) | Status
